productDisplayName: Disney Kids Boy's Green Little Friends Kidswear
description: CompositionRound neck green t-shirt with appliqué cartoon characters on the chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soaking and remove promptlyLine dry inside out in shade.Warm iron only, do not iron directly on print/embroideryPooh says 'hello' to his little friends with this round neck t-shirt in a cheerful green. The contrast neckline and stitch detailing on the shoulders add a touch of 'boyish pride' to this tiny T-shirt. The appliqué Pooh and his Frog friend will make your little boy look cheerful and bright his summer. 100% organic cotton makes it extra soft and comfy on the tender skin.
